ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping mode used */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated from the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode_id") REFERENCES ship_modes ("ship_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., Corporate, Consumer) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the customer was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated from the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sub-category */,
  "standard_price" REAL /* Standard price of the product */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Reorder threshold for the product */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the product is discontinued or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory movement */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., in, out, reorder, return) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product moved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the movement */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
